title: Mark Mcconnell
compiled_truth: Mark Mcconnell is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-08-01 to 2002-03-25), Mark Mcconnell sent 241 and received 876 emails, totalling 1117 interactions. Top correspondents: [Kimberly Watson](people/kimberly-watson) (53), [Sarah Mcconnell](people/sarah-mcconnell-compaq) (30), [Michelle Lokay](people/michelle-lokay) (16), [Steven Harris](people/steven-harris) (16), [Paul Y'Barbo](people/paul-y-barbo) (14). Mailbox folders observed: calendar, contacts, deleted_items, e_mail_bin, elpaso_pipeline, enron_t_s.
